name: Tax-Free Transfers Between Spouses or Incident to Divorce

eligibility.description: Transfer must be to a spouse or a former spouse within 1 year of divorce or related to the cessation of marriage. Does not apply if the recipient is a nonresident alien.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: No gain or loss is recognized on property transfers between spouses or former spouses (if incident to divorce). The transfer is treated as a gift for tax purposes.
